subject: Re: 98,776 Acres - Buyer Brokerage Agreement / Request for more information and your name has been given
body:
sorry   ,my name cannot be used


----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, May 3, 2007 12:15:53 PM
Subject: FW: 98,776 Acres - Buyer Brokerage Agreement / Request for more information and your name has been given


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 




From: Sheridan Gibson [mailto:sheridan@sheridanenterprises.com] 
Sent: Thursday, May 03, 2007 2:15 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: 98,776 Acres - Buyer Brokerage Agreement / Request for more information and your name has been given


Lesley, please forward to Jeffrey.
…….
Jeffrey,
Attached is an Exclusive Buyer Brokerage Agreement.  I have requested further information from the owners of the 98,776 acres in Bay County & Calhoun County , Florida on your behalf.
Please be advised that I have given them your name as an interested party that would like to open up discussions with them.  I have an appointment with Matthew A. Whitley, Portfolio Manager with Forest Investments at 15 Piedmont Center, Suite 1250 , Atlanta GA on Tuesday, May 8th at 10:00am.
Please review this agreement and let’s discuss the contents at your earliest convenience.
Best 
Sheridan
